title: Hardy Boys
author: Franklin W. Dixon
description: America's most beloved boy detectives — Frank and Joe Hardy solve mysteries in Bayport and beyond. These classic adventure stories have thrilled readers since the 1920s.

title: Ted Scott Flying Stories
author: Franklin W. Dixon
description: Follow the daring aviator Ted Scott on record-breaking flights across oceans and continents. Classic aviation adventure for the golden age of flight.

title: Penny Parker
author: Mildred A. Wirt Benson
description: A sharp-witted girl reporter who solves mysteries wherever her investigations lead. Penny Parker is clever, brave, and always on the story.

title: Mercer Boys
author: Capwell Wyckoff
description: The Mercer boys — Don and Cliff — tackle mystery and adventure at school, at sea, and in the wild outdoors.

title: Boy Spies
author: James Otis
description: Thrilling tales of young patriots who spied for the American cause during the Revolutionary War.

title: Outdoor Chums
author: Captain Quincy Allen
description: Four friends explore the wilderness, hunt, fish, and face adventure in the great outdoors of early America.
